content.speakerText: We’re doing a weekend road trip to the mountains—want to come? It’s super cheap!
content.speakerTextCn: 我们周末去山里自驾游，一起来？超便宜的！

options.text: That sounds great! I’ll be there.
That sounds amazing—I’ve been dying to go! But my wallet’s crying this month. Can I join the next one?
I don’t like mountains. Let’s go to the beach instead.
Why should I go? You always pick boring places.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极肯定 + 经济理由 + 未来期待的结构，既表达了兴趣又婉拒了邀请，保留了关系温度。选项1直接接受，不符合预算紧张的设定；选项3转移话题且不礼貌；选项4带有攻击性，破坏友谊。

content.speakerText: Seriously? You always have an excuse!
content.speakerTextCn: 真的吗？你每次都找借口！

options.text: I know, I’m the worst friend for trips right now. But I’m saving up for next season—I’ll be your #1 travel buddy!
Fine, I’ll go. Just book me a spot.
You’re being unfair. I have other priorities.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用自嘲+承诺未来的方式，有效化解对方情绪并重建积极预期。选项1过于消极，缺乏建设性；选项3违背了预算紧张的前提；选项4防御性强，容易激化矛盾。

content.speakerText: Hey, there’s a beach party next weekend—want to join?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，下周末有个海滩派对，一起来吗？

options.text: I’m broke this month, but I’d love to help plan the next one!
I’ll come if you pay for my ticket.
I’m too busy. Maybe next year.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用经济理由+主动参与未来计划，既礼貌又维持关系。选项2直接否定兴趣，缺乏温度；选项3要求对方付费，显得自私；选项4理由模糊，未体现未来意愿，容易被理解为敷衍。
